description: T84 PointsCalculator must NOT accept earnedPoints from client payload. Input shape = answers[] + timeTaken only. Client-submitted point values are untrusted — accepting them allows point farming.
blockConditions: earnedPoints field present in T84 input schema
client-submitted point values accepted by T84
passConditions: T84 input schema contains only answers[] and timeTaken
points calculated server-side using FREEDOM config thresholds — not from client payload
resolution: T84 input schema must NOT include earnedPoints field. Any code path that reads earnedPoints from input payload = BUILD_FAILURE. Server calculates points from answers[] and timeTaken using FREEDOM config thresholds.

description: T96 StreakManager must receive userTimezoneOffset and compute streak boundary as local date (UTC + offset). UTC-only comparison silently breaks streaks for users in positive-offset timezones.
blockConditions: userTimezoneOffset absent from T96 input schema
streak boundary computed in UTC without timezone adjustment
midnight boundary not adjusted for user local timezone
passConditions: streak boundary = midnight in user local timezone
resolution: userTimezoneOffset is a REQUIRED input field. localDate = UTC timestamp + offset. Streak boundary = midnight in user's local timezone. Absent userTimezoneOffset or UTC-only comparison = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T91 QuestionnairePostBuilder must trigger on SocialShareApproved (T90's output), not QuestionnaireAnswered (the original trigger). If T91 shares T90's trigger, T90's privacy check cannot prevent T91 from starting.
blockConditions: T91 @EventPattern set to 'QuestionnaireAnswered'
T91 shares trigger with T90 bypassing privacy check gate
passConditions: T90 is sole entry to Branch C — T91 depends on T90 output
resolution: T91 @EventPattern must be 'SocialShareApproved'. T91 @EventPattern = 'QuestionnaireAnswered' = BUILD_FAILURE. T90 is the SOLE entry to Branch C.

description: T87 AchievementGate must read xiigen-achievement-records BEFORE any emit. Achievement unlocks are idempotent by (userId, achievementId). A second qualifying submission must not emit a second AchievementUnlocked.
blockConditions: AchievementUnlocked emitted without prior history check
duplicate achievement unlock emitted for same (userId, achievementId)
passConditions: searchDocuments('xiigen-achievement-records', { userId, achievementId }) called before any emit
existing record found: return success without emitting AchievementUnlocked
resolution: T87 must call searchDocuments('xiigen-achievement-records', { userId, achievementId }) before any emit. If record exists: return success without emitting. Missing history check = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T89 CurriculumAdapter must apply all three guards before using ML suggestions: (1) count ceiling ≤3, (2) protected required modules removed from suggestions, (3) recency guard < 2 lessons → LearningPlanSkipped (success). Missing any guard = BUILD_FAILURE.
blockConditions: recency guard absent from T89 CurriculumAdapter
count ceiling guard missing (no ≤3 cap)
protected required modules filter missing
LearningPlanSkipped treated as DataProcessResult.failure
passConditions: three guards applied in order: recency check → count ceiling → protected modules filter
ML inference timeout returns partialResults:true as success mode
resolution: Three guards required in order: recency check → count ceiling → protected modules filter. LearningPlanSkipped is DataProcessResult.success, not failure. ML inference timeout → successModes partialResults:true, not failureModes.

description: T85 LedgerUpdater must use ONE atomic incrementAndRecord() call. A separate getBalance → computeNew → setBalance sequence is a race condition under concurrent submissions from the same user.
blockConditions: separate getBalance → computeNew → setBalance sequence used
non-atomic read-then-write creates race condition under concurrent submissions from same user
passConditions: incrementAndRecord() called as single atomic operation
T85 waits for both T84 pointBreakdown and T96 streakBonus before writing
resolution: T85 must call incrementAndRecord() as ONE atomic operation. Separate read-then-write pattern = BUILD_FAILURE. T85 waits for BOTH T84 (pointBreakdown) and T96 (streakBonus) before writing.

description: Completion records knowledgeScope=PRIVATE (per-user). Achievement records PRIVATE. Ledger records PRIVATE. Streak records PRIVATE. T93 (SocialFeedDistributor) reads GLOBAL feed index (intentional â€” published content). T84 reads GLOBAL questionnaire patterns (intentional). PRIVATE records must never be stored as GLOBAL.
blockConditions: completion record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
achievement record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
ledger record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from any stored record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
T84 earnedPoints field present in input schema
passConditions: All completion, achievement, ledger, and streak records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE'
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId (AsyncLocalStorage) in all T83-T98 services
No completion-gamification records stored with knowledgeScope: 'GLOBAL'
